scene_title: La nave salpa verso la nuova rotta
narrative_role: Atto III, risoluzione. La nuova rotta è iniziata.

prompt_components.shot_type: Wide static shot from the shore POV
prompt_components.subject: the antique sailing ship, now turned, beginning to sail away toward the horizon with sails fully set
prompt_components.action: the ship gains speed, sails catching the wind, water churning at the bow; from this POV (the island's shore), we watch it leave
prompt_components.environment: open ocean opening up before the ship, low golden sun creating a dramatic backlight, the ship as a silhouette against the warm horizon
prompt_components.camera_movement: completely static wide shot, the ship moves through frame
prompt_components.lighting: strong directional golden hour from the horizon, the ship in beautiful silhouette
prompt_components.mood: majestic, the beginning of a new chapter, hopeful and forward-moving
prompt_components.audio_hint: sails snapping in wind, water cutting through bow, distant gulls, music swelling to a peaceful climax

acceptance_criteria: Nave in silhouette contro l'orizzonte dorato
Camera ferma, la nave si muove dentro il frame
